docs.title: VSAP Help Center
docs.text: Welcome to the Vessel Impact Platform documentation. Use the navigation to find guides, references, and tutorials.

docs.title: Quick Links
docs.text:
• Getting Started
  • Assessments

docs.title: Accounts
docs.text: The Accounts section lets you manage all organizations and companies tracked in the platform.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Browse and search the full list of accounts
  • View account details and associated evaluations
  • Create new accounts

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Account Details
  • Create Account
  • Evaluations

docs.title: Create Account
docs.text: Use this form to add a new account to the platform.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Enter company name, contact, industry, and location
  • Set account-level properties
  • Save the account and begin adding evaluations

docs.title: Fields
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Accounts
  • Account Details

docs.title: Account Details
docs.text: The Account Details page shows all information associated with a specific account.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• View contact information, industry classification, and location
  • See evaluations linked to this account
  • Edit account information

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Evaluations
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Edit Account
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Accounts
  • Evaluations

docs.title: Assessments
docs.text: This section covers everything related to assessments in VSAP.

docs.title: Dashboard
docs.text: The Dashboard provides an at-a-glance overview of your organization's activity and key metrics.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• View summary cards for recent activity
  • Navigate to detailed reports and evaluations
  • Access the Pivot Table for cross-sectional analysis

docs.title: Summary Cards
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Recent Activity
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Pivot Table
  • Evaluations

docs.title: Pivot Table
docs.text: The Pivot Table allows you to slice and analyze evaluation data across multiple dimensions for a specific assessment definition.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Select rows, columns, and values to pivot on
  • Filter by date range, account, or evaluation status
  • Export results

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Dashboard
  • Evaluations

docs.title: Ecosystem
docs.text: The Ecosystem map provides a geographic and relational view of manufacturers, MEP centers, and other entities in your regional ecosystem.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Explore establishments on an interactive map
  • Filter by industry, size, or location
  • View relationships between entities
  • Identify gaps and opportunities in the ecosystem

docs.title: Map Controls
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Filters
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Industries
  • Accounts

docs.title: Evaluations
docs.text: The Evaluations section is the primary workspace for managing assessment instances across your accounts.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Browse all evaluations across accounts
  • Filter by assessment type, status, or date
  • Open an evaluation collection for a specific definition
  • Create new evaluations

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Evaluation Details
  • Report Builder
  • Create Evaluation
  • Library

docs.title: Create Evaluation
docs.text: Use this form to start a new evaluation for an account.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Select the account and assessment definition
  • Set the evaluation date and assignee
  • Begin filling in responses

docs.title: Fields
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Evaluations
  • Library

docs.title: Evaluation Details
docs.text: The Evaluation Details page shows all data captured for a single evaluation instance.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Review all question responses and scores
  • See scoring summaries and breakdowns
  • Edit the evaluation
  • Navigate to the Report Builder for this evaluation

docs.title: Responses
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Scoring
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Edit Evaluation
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Evaluations
  • Report Builder

docs.title: Report Builder
docs.text: The Report Builder lets you generate analysis and scoring reports from evaluation data.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Select evaluations to include in the report
  • Choose scoring dimensions and comparison views
  • Export or share reports

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Evaluations
  • Evaluation Details
  • Dashboard Pivot Table

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Welcome to the VSAP Help Center. Get up and running quickly with the guides below.

docs.title: Creating Your Account
docs.text: This page explains how to create and set up your VSAP account.

docs.title: Navigating the Dashboard
docs.text: This page provides an overview of the VSAP dashboard and how to navigate it.

docs.title: Industries
docs.text: The Industries page (NAICS Explorer) lets you browse and explore the North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) codes associated with your accounts and ecosystem.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Search and browse NAICS codes
  • See which accounts belong to each industry classification
  • Understand industry distribution across your ecosystem

docs.title: About NAICS Codes
docs.text: NAICS (North American Industry Classification System) codes are six-digit codes used to classify businesses by industry. They are used throughout VSAP to categorize accounts and filter ecosystem data.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Ecosystem
  • Accounts

docs.title: Library
docs.text: The Library contains all assessment definitions — the templates used to create evaluation instances.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Browse all available assessment definitions
  • View the structure and questions of each assessment
  • Create new assessment definitions
  • Edit existing definitions

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Create Assessment
  • Edit Assessment
  • Evaluations

docs.title: Create Assessment Definition
docs.text: Use this editor to build a new assessment definition that can be used to create evaluations.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Define sections and questions
  • Set scoring rules and weights
  • Configure conditional logic
  • Publish the definition for use in evaluations

docs.title: Editor
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Library
  • Edit Assessment

docs.title: Edit Assessment Definition
docs.text: Modify an existing assessment definition in the Library.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Update questions, sections, and scoring rules
  • Manage versions of the assessment
  • Preview changes before publishing

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
Impact on existing evaluations

Editing a published assessment definition may affect existing evaluations that use it. Review changes carefully before saving.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Library
  • Create Assessment

docs.title: Settings
docs.text: The Settings section allows administrators to configure platform-wide options for their organization.

docs.title: Available Settings
docs.text:
• Branding — customize logos, colors, and terminology
  • Custom Data — manage NAICS codes and Regional Manufacturer Associations

docs.title: Access
docs.text: Settings are only available to users with the admin role and require the Settings feature flag to be enabled for your account.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Branding
  • Custom Data

docs.title: Branding
docs.text: Configure the visual identity and terminology for your platform instance.

docs.title: What you can do here
docs.text:
• Upload your organization's logo
  • Set primary and accent colors
  • Customize the name used for "Evaluations" (evaluation property name translation)
  • Preview changes before saving

docs.title: Fields
docs.text: Coming soon.

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
Terminology customization

The name used for "Evaluations" throughout the platform can be changed here to match your organization's language (e.g., "Assessments", "Reviews").

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Settings
  • Custom Data

docs.title: Custom Data
docs.text: Manage organization-specific reference data used throughout the platform.

docs.title: NAICS Codes
docs.text:
• [Route: /settings/custom-data/naics]
  • Add, edit, or remove NAICS industry codes available to your accounts
  • Customize the industry classification list for your ecosystem

docs.title: Regional Manufacturer Associations (RMA)
docs.text:
• [Route: /settings/custom-data/rma]
  • Manage the list of regional manufacturing associations
  • Associate accounts with RMAs for ecosystem analysis

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• Settings
  • Industries
